items.name: Aqua Splash Dress [PBR]
items.description:
💦 Fresh, flowy, and oh-so-cool! 💦
This aqua-blue dress is decorated with splatter-like accents that create a playful, water-inspired effect. Light and breezy, it’s perfect for summer adventures or casual roleplay looks.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Aqua tones for a refreshing vibe
Splatter pattern for a fun, unique look
Breezy, flared design for comfort
Great for summer, beach, or casual outfits
🔍 Keywords: dress, aqua, blue, summer, splash, casual, cute, aesthetic, water, fresh
🌊 Dive into fresh summer style!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
